package rulecoverage

func NegativeWriterWriteByteSliceOfString() string {
    ruleID := "writer_write_byte_slice_of_string"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`writer.Write([]byte(s))` instead of `io.WriteString(writer, s)`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
